{"fitness":{"grade":"A","comments":"I work out 4-5 days a week, alternating between PPL and cardio. I like to go running, and every day I walk for at least 30 minutes to get my steps in. 
"},"water":{"grade":"B-","comments":"I need to be better about this. I fluctuate between good and bad"},"meals":{"grade":"A","comments":"I eat normal portions, twice a day. I focus on protein intake but I’m not actually tracking anything."},"career":{"grade":"B","comments":"I’m still an early-career student about to graduate, and while I have some experiences that I’m proud of, I feel like I could do better (we all feel that).
"},"mental":{"grade":"B","comments":"• Log mood entries more frequently to track patterns over time
